title: Create a Generator for an Nx Plugin
description: Create a Generator for an Nx Plugin.

examples.description: Generate a generator named 'foo' in the 'myplugin' project. It results in the generator `foo` at `tools/myplugin/src/lib/generators/foo/generator.ts`

Generate a generator named 'bar' in the 'myplugin' project, placing the files in a custom directory 'custom-dir'. It results in the generator `bar` being named 'bar' in the generators collection file, but placed in the `tools/myplugin/src/lib/custom-dir/generator.ts` file.

name.description: The generator name to export in the plugin generators collection.

project.description: The name of the project in which to place the generator.  Project must be of type `plugin`.

directory.description: A directory relative to the plugin's `src/lib/generators` directory in which to create the generator files.  Defaults to the generator name.

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests.

skipLintChecks.description: Do not add an eslint configuration for plugin json files.

minimal.description: Generate a generator with a minimal setup. No README.md generated.

skipFormat.description: Do not format files with prettier.
